race.comment: GOD SHE'S SASSY (7) resumed and may have had excuses seeking the hat-trick at Northam when last seen. Flies fresh, and the 1.5kg claimer will use the inside barrier. May come back further improved and will be tough to roll regardless. KARNUP QUEEN (9) also goes fresh and also rates well. Draws wide but just missed two back at Belmont from the 12 gate. Pike is a key jockey engagement and count on him to manage. Can threaten with average luck. A gap then to THE KING'S UNCLE (3), who resumes off a very long break and can get some of the minor money if presented forward. Draws inside and will be running into it. MANTUA (6) mixes the form but likes this trip and won't be far away. DYNAMIC ONE (1) is a former NSW galloper who came off a month break but didn't get warm at Bunbury over 1400m in stronger. Has been freshened 59 days and may go better switching back to a short sprint.
